---
listing:
  contents: publication
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  max-description-length: 200
  max-items: 4
  table-striped: true
page-layout: full
comments: false
---

```{=html}

<p style="text-align: center; font-size: 40px;">

Publication

</p>

<p style="text-align: center; font-size: 20px;">

This is my bookcase for research publication

</p>
```
------------------------------------------------------------------------
